title: Poisson semigroup and the Gruet formula for the heat kernels on spaces of constant curvature
summary: This paper is concerned with the Poisson and heat equations on spaces of constant curvature. More explicitly we provide new methods for obtaining old and new explicit formulas for the Poisson and heat semigroups on the Euclidean, spherical and hyperbolic spaces $\R^n$, $§^n$ and $\H^n$ . We obtain the Gruet formula for the heat kernels in Euclidean and spherical spaces $\R^n$ and $§^n$, which are new and we provide a new elementary method to derive the classical Gruet formula Gruet\cite{Gruet} for the kernel of the heat semigroup on the hyperbolic space $\H^n$.

AI.tldr: 提出了在常曲率空间（欧氏、球面、双曲空间）上获得泊松和热方程显式公式的新方法
AI.motivation: 研究常曲率空间（欧氏空间ℝⁿ、球面§ⁿ、双曲空间ℍⁿ）上的泊松方程和热方程，旨在获得这些方程解算子的显式公式，特别是热核的显式表达式
AI.techniques: 使用新方法推导显式公式，包括获得欧氏和球面空间热核的Gruet公式的新证明，以及对双曲空间经典Gruet公式的初等新推导方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 获得了欧氏空间ℝⁿ和球面§ⁿ上热核的Gruet公式（新结果）；2) 提供了双曲空间ℍⁿ上经典Gruet公式的新初等推导方法；3) 建立了常曲率空间上泊松和热半群的显式公式
AI.significance: 扩展了常曲率空间上椭圆和抛物方程的理论，提供了计算热核的新工具，对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有重要意义，特别是在黎曼流形上的分析

title: Construction of a Gibbs measure for the zonal Dirac equation
summary: We propose a framework to construct Gibbs measures for the Dirac equation. We consider the Dirac equation on the sphere with a "Hartree-type" nonlinearity. We consider a zonal model, that is the analog of a spherically symmetric model but on the sphere. We build a Gibbs measure for this model. With a compactness argument, we prove the existence of a random variable that is a weak solution to the Dirac equation and whose law is the Gibbs measure at all times.

AI.tldr: 构建球面上具有Hartree型非线性的Dirac方程的Gibbs测度框架
AI.motivation: 研究Dirac方程在球面上的Gibbs测度构造问题，特别是针对具有Hartree型非线性的情况，建立类似于球对称模型的zonal模型
AI.techniques: Gibbs测度构造框架、紧致性论证、随机变量构造、弱解存在性证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构建了该模型的Gibbs测度；2. 证明了存在一个随机变量，它是Dirac方程的弱解，并且在所有时刻其分布都是Gibbs测度
AI.significance: 为Dirac方程的随机分析提供了新的理论框架，将Gibbs测度方法扩展到球面上的非线性Dirac方程，对量子场论和随机偏微分方程有重要意义

title: On large periodic traveling surface waves in porous media
summary: We study large traveling surface waves within a two-dimensional finite depth, free boundary, homogeneous, incompressible and viscous fluid governed by Darcy's law. The fluid is bound by a gravitational force to a flat rigid bottom and meets an atmosphere of constant pressure at the top with its free surface, where it does not experience any capillarity effects. Additionally, the fluid is subject to a fixed, but arbitrarily selected, forcing data profile with variable amplitude. We use the Riemann mapping to equivalently reformulate the resulting two-dimensional free boundary problem as a single one-dimensional fully nonlinear pseudodifferential equation for a function describing the domain's geometry. By discovering a hidden ellipticity in the reformulated equation, we are able to import a global implicit function theorem to construct a connected set of traveling waves, containing both the quiescent solution and large amplitude members. We find that either solutions continue to exist for arbitrarily large data amplitude or else one of a finite number of meaningful breakdown scenarios must occur. This work stands as the first non perturbative construction of large traveling surface waves in any free boundary viscous fluid without surface tension.

AI.tldr: 首次在无表面张力的粘性自由边界流体中非微扰地构造了大振幅行波解
AI.motivation: 研究二维有限深度、自由边界、不可压缩粘性流体（遵循达西定律）中的大振幅行波，该流体受重力约束于刚性底部，顶部自由表面与常压大气接触且无毛细效应，并受任意选择的强迫数据剖面作用
AI.techniques: 使用黎曼映射将二维自由边界问题转化为一维完全非线性伪微分方程，发现隐藏的椭圆性，应用全局隐函数定理构造连通的行波解集
AI.main_theorems: 构造了包含静止解和大振幅成员的连通行波解集，证明要么解对任意大振幅数据存在，要么发生有限个有意义的破裂情形
AI.significance: 首次在无表面张力的粘性自由边界流体中非微扰地构造大振幅行波，为粘性流体自由边界问题提供了新的分析方法

title: Topological and Purely Topological Alignment Dynamics
summary: We study the Euler Alignment system of collective behavior, equipped with `topological' interaction protocols, which were introduced to the mathematical literature by Shvydkoy and Tadmor. Interactions subject to these protocols may depend on both the Euclidean distance between agents and on the mass distribution between them -- the `topological' component. When the interaction protocol is regular, we prove sufficient conditions for the existence of global-in-time classical solutions, related to the initial nonnegativity of a conserved quantity of the system. The remainder of our results explore the case where the interactions are `purely' topological and the interactions do not depend on the Euclidean distance. We show that in this case, the system decouples into an autonomous velocity equation in mass coordinates together with a scalar conservation law with time-dependent flux determined by the velocity. We analyze the long-time behavior for the dynamics associated to both regular and singular protocols.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有拓扑交互协议的Euler Alignment系统，证明了正则协议下全局经典解的存在条件，并分析了纯拓扑交互情形下系统的解耦结构和长时间行为
AI.motivation: 研究Shvydkoy和Tadmor引入的具有拓扑交互协议的集体行为Euler Alignment系统，这类交互不仅依赖于欧氏距离，还依赖于智能体间的质量分布（拓扑成分），旨在理解这类系统的解的存在性、结构特性和长时间行为
AI.techniques: 使用守恒量分析、质量坐标变换、系统解耦方法、自治速度方程分析、含时依赖通量的标量守恒律研究，以及正则和奇异协议下的长时间行为分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 正则交互协议下，基于系统守恒量初始非负性的全局经典解存在性充分条件；2. 纯拓扑交互情形下，系统可解耦为质量坐标中的自治速度方程和由速度决定的含时依赖通量的标量守恒律；3. 正则和奇异协议下系统长时间行为的分析结果
AI.significance: 扩展了Euler Alignment系统的理论框架，为拓扑交互协议提供了严格的数学分析，揭示了系统在纯拓扑交互下的特殊结构性质，为理解集体行为中拓扑依赖交互的动力学特性提供了理论基础

title: Weighted fractional ultrahyperbolic diffusion on geometrically deformed domains
summary: Standard fractional models on manifolds often conflate geometric anisotropy with medium heterogeneity. In this Letter, we overcome this rigidity by deriving the fundamental solution for a weighted space-time fractional ultrahyperbolic operator, denoted by $(-\Box_{φ,ω})^β$. Using a novel spectral approach based on the Weighted Fourier Transform, we explicitly \textbf{decouple the medium density from the geometric deformation}. A crucial finding is the emergence of a \textbf{geometry-independent drift mechanism} driven purely by the inhomogeneity of the medium. The Green's function is obtained in closed form via the Fox H-function, providing a unified and computable framework for anomalous transport in complex, structurally deformed media.

AI.tldr: 提出加权时空分数超双曲算子的基本解，首次将介质密度与几何形变解耦，揭示纯介质不均匀性驱动的几何无关漂移机制。
AI.motivation: 传统分数模型在流形上常将几何各向异性与介质不均匀性混为一谈，缺乏区分这两种效应的数学框架，限制了复杂变形介质中反常输运的精确建模。
AI.techniques: 采用基于加权傅里叶变换的新型谱方法，通过Fox H函数获得闭式格林函数，实现介质密度与几何形变的数学解耦。
AI.main_theorems: 推导出加权时空分数超双曲算子$(-\Box_{φ,ω})^β$的基本解，证明存在纯介质不均匀性驱动的几何无关漂移机制，获得Fox H函数表示的闭式格林函数。
AI.significance: 为复杂变形介质中的反常输运提供了统一可计算框架，首次实现几何效应与介质性质的数学分离，对多孔介质、生物组织等非均匀环境中的输运现象建模有重要意义。

title: Global weak solutions to the isentropic compressible Navier--Stokes equations with vacuum and unbounded density in a half-plane under Dirichlet boundary conditions
summary: We establish the global existence of a class of weak solutions to the isentropic compressible Navier--Stokes equations in a half-plane with Dirichlet boundary conditions, allowing for vacuum both in the interior and at infinity, under a suitably small initial total energy. The solutions constructed here admit unbounded densities and lie in an intermediate regularity regime between the finite-energy weak solutions of Lions--Feireisl and the framework of Hoff. This result generalizes previous works of Hoff (Comm. Pure Appl. Math. 55 (2002), pp. 1365--1407) and Perepelitsa (Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 212 (2014), pp. 709--726) concerning discontinuous solutions by allowing vacuum states and unbounded density. Our analysis relies on the Green function method and new estimates involving the specific structure of the equations and the geometry of the half-plane. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first result concerning global weak solutions within Hoff's framework on an unbounded domain that simultaneously accommodates Dirichlet boundary conditions and far-field vacuum. The intermediate-regularity class developed here may be viewed as a natural extension of Hoff's theory, precisely tailored to overcome the two corresponding obstructions: the lack of global space-time control of the effective viscous flux arising from far-field vacuum and the absence of boundary-induced regularity gains in the no-slip setting.

AI.tldr: 建立了半平面上具有真空状态和Dirichlet边界条件的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程全局弱解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究半平面上可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在真空状态和Dirichlet边界条件下的全局解存在性问题，克服了Hoff理论在无界域和真空状态下的两个主要障碍
AI.techniques: Green函数方法、新的估计技术、利用方程特定结构和半平面几何性质、中间正则性框架
AI.main_theorems: 在半平面上建立了具有真空状态和Dirichlet边界条件的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程全局弱解的存在性，解允许无界密度且位于有限能量弱解和Hoff框架之间的中间正则性区域
AI.significance: 首次在Hoff框架下得到无界域上同时满足Dirichlet边界条件和远场真空的全局弱解，发展了中间正则性理论，克服了真空状态和边界条件带来的技术困难

title: Lowest eigenvalues and higher order elliptic differential operators
summary: Let $(M,g)$ be a closed, smooth Riemannian manifold of dimension $m \geq 1$. It is not difficult to produce an example of an elliptic differential operator on $(M,g)$ that has the property that there exists a sign-changing eigenfunction that is associated with the lowest eigenvalue. Indeed, $Δ_g^2 + λ_2 Δ_g$ does the job, where $Δ_g:=div_g \nabla_g$. and where $λ_2$ is the second lowest eigenvalue of the operator $-Δ_g$. The question that remains is how rare are elliptic differential operators whose lowest eigenvalue has this property. In this paper, the author proves that elliptic operators of the form $Δ_g^2 - div_g(T-λ_2 g^{-1}) d$, where $T$ is a negative semi-definite $(2,0)$-tensor field on $M$, and where $g^{-1}$ is the inverse metric tensor, have the property that there exists a sign-changing eigenfunction that is associated with the lowest eigenvalue of the operator. This suggests that there are a lot of fourth-order elliptic operators with the property that there exists a sign-changing eigenfunction that is associated with the lowest eigenvalue of the operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了存在一大类四阶椭圆算子，其最低特征值对应的特征函数会变号
AI.motivation: 研究椭圆微分算子最低特征值对应特征函数的符号性质，特别是探讨有多少算子会出现最低特征值对应变号特征函数的情况
AI.techniques: 利用黎曼几何中的拉普拉斯算子、张量场分析、特征值理论，构造特定形式的四阶椭圆算子
AI.main_theorems: 证明了形如Δ_g² - div_g(T-λ₂g⁻¹)d的椭圆算子（其中T是负半定(2,0)-张量场，λ₂是-Δ_g的第二特征值）具有性质：存在与算子最低特征值相关的变号特征函数
AI.significance: 揭示了四阶椭圆算子中最低特征值对应变号特征函数的现象相当普遍，深化了对椭圆算子谱性质的理解

title: Microscopic derivation of a one-dimensional lubrication model with roughness
summary: We derive a hydrodynamic model for the motion of inertial particles with a spherical hard core, interacting through lubrication forces and pairwise repulsive forces. The repulsion arises from the assumption that each particle is surrounded by a thin rough layer of reduced permeability. We prove that, as the number of particles tends to infinity (and their size tends to 0), the microscopic dynamics converges to a macroscopic hydrodynamic model in which congestion effects are encoded directly into the macroscopic interaction forces, depending on a local critical density transported by the flow. In particular, we extend the work of Lefebvre-Lepot and Maury where non-inertial particles, submitted to only a lubrication force were considered, and present the convergence proof when inertial effects and roughness are taken into account.

AI.tldr: 建立了考虑惯性效应和粗糙度的球形硬核粒子微观动力学到宏观流体动力学模型的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究具有球形硬核的惯性粒子在润滑力和成对排斥力作用下的运动，扩展Lefebvre-Lepot和Maury关于非惯性粒子（仅受润滑力）的工作，考虑惯性效应和粗糙度的影响
AI.techniques: 粒子系统极限理论、流体动力学建模、润滑力分析、排斥力建模、微观到宏观的收敛性证明、临界密度传输方程
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当粒子数量趋于无穷（粒子尺寸趋于零）时，微观动力学收敛到宏观流体动力学模型，其中拥堵效应通过依赖于流动传输的局部临界密度的宏观相互作用力直接编码
AI.significance: 扩展了拥挤粒子系统的流体动力学理论，为考虑惯性效应和表面粗糙度的颗粒流建模提供了严格的数学基础，对悬浮液、颗粒材料等应用领域有重要意义

title: Boojums in Liquid Crystals Around a Colloid
comment: 43 pages, 5 figures. This work studies the Landau-de Gennes theory for spherical colloids with boojum disclinations
summary: We study the Landau-de Gennes theory in the one constant limit. The bulk domain is the exterior of a spherical colloid. A Rapini-Papoular surface potential is imposed on the colloid surface, supplemented by a homogeneous far-field condition at spatial infinity. Under the axially symmetric ansatz and the Lyuksyutov constraint, we show that energy minimizers exhibit boojum disclinations at the two poles of the colloid. The local structure of these boojum disclinations is also characterized.

AI.tldr: 在Landau-de Gennes理论的一常数极限下，证明了球状胶体外域中能量极小化子在两个极点处呈现boojum向错
AI.motivation: 研究球状胶体外部液晶系统的向错结构，特别是Rapini-Papoular表面势和均匀远场条件下的能量极小化问题
AI.techniques: 采用轴对称假设和Lyuksyutov约束，分析Landau-de Gennes理论的一常数极限，研究能量极小化子的局部结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明能量极小化子在胶体两个极点处存在boojum向错，并刻画了这些向错的局部结构特征
AI.significance: 为液晶系统中球状胶体周围的向错结构提供了严格数学分析，对软物质物理和液晶理论有重要理论意义

title: Sharpness of the Osgood Criterion for the Continuity Equation with Divergence-free Vector Fields
summary: For any modulus of continuity $ω$ that fails the Osgood condition, we construct a divergence-free velocity field $v \in C_t C^ω_x$ for which the associated ODE admits at least two distinct flow maps. In other words, non-uniqueness does not occur merely for a single or even finitely many trajectories, but instead on a set of initial conditions $E$ of positive Lebesgue measure. In fact, the set $E$ has full measure inside a cube where the construction is supported. Moreover, we also construct a divergence-free velocity field $v \in C_{t}C^ω_x$ for which the associated continuity equation admits two distinct solutions $μ^1$ and $μ^2$ which are absolutely continuous with respect to Lebesgue measure for almost every time, and start from the same initial datum $\bar μ\ll \mathscr{L}^{d}$. Our construction introduces two novel ideas: (i) We introduce the notion of "parallelization", where at each time, the velocity field consists of simultaneous motion across multiple nested spatial scales. This differs from most explicit constructions in the literature on mixing or anomalous dissipation, where the velocity on different scales acts at separate times. This is crucial to cover the whole class of non-Osgood moduli of continuity. (ii) Inspired by a recent work of Bruè, Colombo and Kumar, we develop a new fixed-point framework that naturally incorporates the parallelization mechanism. This framework allows us to construct anomalous solutions of the continuity equation that belong to $L^1(\mathbb{R}^d)$ a.e. in time.

AI.tldr: 构造了不满足Osgood条件的模连续度下，散度为零速度场对应的ODE和连续性方程存在非唯一解的反例
AI.motivation: 研究在何种正则性条件下，流体力学中的ODE（描述粒子轨迹）和连续性方程（描述密度演化）具有唯一性。Osgood条件是保证唯一性的经典条件，本文研究当模连续度不满足Osgood条件时的非唯一性现象。
AI.techniques: 引入了"并行化"新概念：速度场在每一时刻同时作用于多个嵌套空间尺度；发展了新的不动点框架，结合并行化机制构造反常解；构造了具有正Lebesgue测度非唯一性轨迹的集合。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任何不满足Osgood条件的模连续度ω，构造了散度为零速度场v∈C_tC^ω_x，使得：1) 对应的ODE至少有两个不同的流映射；2) 对应的连续性方程有两个不同的解μ^1和μ^2，它们对几乎每个时间都关于Lebesgue测度绝对连续，且始于相同初始数据。
AI.significance: 首次系统研究了非Osgood模连续度下的非唯一性问题，证明了非唯一性不仅发生在孤立轨迹上，而是在正测度集合上出现；为流体力学中弱解唯一性问题提供了新的反例构造方法；引入的并行化技术可能对研究混合和反常耗散有更广泛的应用。

title: Higher integrability of solutions to elliptic equations under additional sign constraints
summary:
Solutions to elliptic equations often exhibit higher regularity properties such as \emph{higher integrability}. That is, for instance, a solution $u$ to a system that a priori only satisfies $ u \in W^{1,r}$ is more regular and even in the Sobolev space $W^{1,s}$ for some $s>r$. Under additional constraints of the sign of specific terms such as $(\partial_i u)$ this improvement of regularity can be sharpened further.
  In this work, we consider two examples of such higher integrability results: First, we show a version of Müller's result on the higher integrability of the determinant for maps $u \in W^{1,n} $ such that $\mathrm{det}(\nabla u) \geq 0$ (or $ \mathrm{det}_-(\nabla u) \in L \log L$). Second, we consider (very weak) solutions to the $p$-Laplace equation that satisfy sign constraints for their partial derivatives, i.e. that $(\partial_i u)_- $ is of higher integrability than $(\partial_i u)_+$. To prove our results, we use the method of Lipschitz truncation; for the second example we further develop a variation of this technique, the \emph{asymmetric} Lipschitz truncation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了椭圆方程解的高可积性，在符号约束条件下改进了Müller行列式高可积性结果，并为p-Laplace方程发展了一种非对称Lipschitz截断方法。
AI.motivation: 椭圆方程解通常具有高可积性等更高正则性，但在特定项符号约束下，这种正则性改进可以进一步强化。本文旨在研究两种情形下的高可积性结果：带符号约束的行列式高可积性和p-Laplace方程偏导数符号约束下的解正则性。
AI.techniques: 主要采用Lipschitz截断方法，特别是为第二个例子发展了非对称Lipschitz截断技术，这是对标准Lipschitz截断方法的变体。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 改进了Müller关于W^{1,n}映射行列式高可积性的结果，要求det(∇u)≥0或det_-(∇u)∈L log L；2. 证明了p-Laplace方程（非常弱）解在偏导数满足符号约束（即(∂_i u)_-比(∂_i u)_+具有更高可积性）时的高可积性。
AI.significance: 扩展了椭圆方程正则性理论，特别是在符号约束条件下的高可积性结果；发展了非对称Lipschitz截断这一新工具，为处理偏导数符号不对称问题提供了有效方法，对变分法、非线性椭圆方程和几何测度论有重要意义。

title: Navier slip effects in micropolar thin-film flow: a rigorous derivation of Reynolds-type models
summary: We study the stationary flow of incompressible micropolar fluid in a thin three-dimensional domain under Navier slip boundary condition for the velocity and no-spin condition for microrotation. After rescaling the governing equations, we perform a rigorous asymptotic analysis as the film thickness tends to zero, considering a friction coefficient dependent on the small parameter. According to the scaling of the slip coefficient, we identify three distinct regimes: perfect slip, partial slip, and no-slip. For each regime, we derive the corresponding reduced micropolar system and obtain explicit expressions for the velocity and microrotation fields. This leads to a generalized Reynolds-type equation for the pressure, highlighting the impact of slip effects on the micropolar thin-film flow.

AI.tldr: 研究了薄三维区域中不可压缩微极性流体在Navier滑移边界条件下的渐近行为，识别了三种滑移机制并推导了相应的简化系统。
AI.motivation: 研究微极性流体在薄三维区域中的定常流动问题，考虑Navier滑移边界条件（速度）和无自旋条件（微旋转），分析薄膜厚度趋于零时的渐近行为，特别关注滑移系数随小参数变化的影响。
AI.techniques: 采用尺度变换和严格渐近分析方法，根据滑移系数的标度识别三种不同机制，推导简化微极性系统，获得速度和微旋转场的显式表达式，建立广义Reynolds型压力方程。
AI.main_theorems: 识别了三种滑移机制：完全滑移、部分滑移和无滑移；对每种机制推导了相应的简化微极性系统；获得了速度和微旋转场的显式表达式；建立了考虑滑移效应的广义Reynolds型压力方程。
AI.significance: 为微极性流体薄层流动提供了系统的渐近分析框架，揭示了滑移边界条件对流动特性的影响，建立了连接微观旋转效应与宏观流动行为的数学模型，对润滑理论、微流体力学等领域有重要应用价值。

title: Fractional Semilinear Equations on Hyperbolic Spaces
summary: We study a semilinear equation involving the fractional Laplacian on the hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^n$. Unlike in conformally compact Einstein manifolds, the fractional Laplacian on $\mathbb{H}^n$ does not enjoy conformal covariance. By employing Helgason-Fourier analysis, we explicitly derive the Green's function of the fractional Laplacian on $\mathbb{H}^n$ and study its asymptotic behaviors. We then apply a direct method of moving planes to the integral form of the equation, establishing symmetry of solutions and nonexistence of positive solutions in the critical and subcritical cases, respectively. In addition, we develop several maximum principles on hyperbolic space.

AI.tldr: 研究双曲空间上分数阶拉普拉斯算子的格林函数、渐近行为，并应用移动平面法证明解对称性和不存在性
AI.motivation: 研究双曲空间上分数阶拉普拉斯算子的半线性方程，与共形紧爱因斯坦流形不同，双曲空间上的分数阶拉普拉斯算子不具有共形协变性，需要建立相应的分析框架
AI.techniques: Helgason-Fourier分析、格林函数显式推导、移动平面法（积分形式）、双曲空间上的最大值原理
AI.main_theorems: 推导了双曲空间上分数阶拉普拉斯算子的格林函数及其渐近行为；在临界和次临界情况下分别证明了正解的不存在性和解的对称性；建立了双曲空间上的多个最大值原理
AI.significance: 为双曲空间上的分数阶偏微分方程建立了分析基础，发展了非欧几里得几何背景下的分数阶算子理论，为相关非线性问题的研究提供了工具

title: Sobolev inequalities for nonlinear Dirichlet forms
summary: In this short note we show an equivalence between Sobolev type inequalities and so called isocapacitary inequalities in the context of a large class of nonlinear Dirichlet forms, their associated Dirichlet spaces and their associated capacities.

AI.tldr: 建立了Sobolev型不等式与等容不等式在非线性Dirichlet形式、Dirichlet空间及其容量框架下的等价性
AI.motivation: 研究非线性Dirichlet形式框架下Sobolev不等式与等容不等式之间的关系，这类不等式在偏微分方程、几何分析和概率论中具有基础重要性
AI.techniques: 使用非线性Dirichlet形式理论、容量理论、函数空间嵌入技术，通过分析Dirichlet空间的结构性质建立等价关系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在广泛的非线性Dirichlet形式及其相关Dirichlet空间和容量框架下，Sobolev型不等式与等容不等式是等价的
AI.significance: 统一了两种重要不等式类型，为非线性椭圆方程、几何测度论和随机分析提供了新的理论工具，扩展了经典线性情形的结果

title: Time-asymptotic stability of composite waves of degenerate Oleinik shock and rarefaction for non-convex conservation laws with Cattaneo's law
summary: This paper examines the large-time behavior of solutions to a one-dimensional conservation law featuring a non-convex flux and an artificial heat flux term regulated by Cattaneo's law, forming a 2$\times$2 system of hyperbolic equations. Under the conditions of small wave strength and sufficiently small initial perturbations, we demonstrate the time-asymptotic stability of a composite wave that combines a degenerate Oleinik shock and a rarefaction wave. The proof utilizes the Oleinik entropy condition, the a-contraction method with time-dependent shifts, and weighted energy estimates.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有非凸通量和Cattaneo热通量的一维守恒律系统中，由退化Oleinik激波和稀疏波组成的复合波在长时间下的稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有非凸通量和Cattaneo热通量定律的一维守恒律系统（2×2双曲方程组）的长时间行为，这类系统在流体力学和热传导中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用Oleinik熵条件、带时间依赖平移的a-压缩方法、加权能量估计，以及小波强度和小初始扰动条件下的稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 在小波强度和足够小的初始扰动条件下，证明了由退化Oleinik激波和稀疏波组成的复合波的时间渐近稳定性
AI.significance: 为具有非凸通量和热记忆效应的双曲守恒律系统提供了新的稳定性理论，扩展了复合波稳定性分析的方法框架

title: Stabilization of arbitrary structures in a three-dimensional doubly degenerate nutrient taxis system
summary:
The doubly degenerate nutrient taxis system  egin{equation}\label {0.1} \left\{  egin{aligned} &u_{t}=
abla \cdot (uv
abla u)-χ
abla \cdot (u^αv
abla v)+\ell uv,&x\in Ω,\, t>0,\ & v_{t}=Δv-uv,&x\in Ω,\, t>0,\ \end{aligned} ight. \end{equation} is considered under zero-flux boundary conditions in a smoothly bounded domain $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^3$ where $α>0,χ>0$ and $\ell> 0$. By developing a novel class of functional inequalities to address the challenges posed by
  the doubly degenerate diffusion mechanism in \eqref{0.1}, it is shown that for $α\in( rac{3}{2}, rac{19}{12})$, the associated initial-boundary value problem admits a global continuous weak solution for sufficiently regular initial data. Furthermore, in an appropriate topological setting, this solution converges to an equilibrium $(u_\infty, 0)$ as $tightarrow \infty$. Notably, the limiting profile $u_{\infty}$ is non-homogeneous when the initial signal concentration $v_0$ is sufficiently small, provided the initial data $u_0$ is not identically constant.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维空间中双退化营养趋化系统在特定参数范围内存在全局连续弱解并收敛到非均匀平衡态
AI.motivation: 研究三维有界区域中具有双退化扩散机制的营养趋化系统，该系统包含非线性扩散项和趋化项，旨在解决这类高度非线性PDE系统的全局存在性和长时间行为问题
AI.techniques: 发展了一类新的函数不等式来处理双退化扩散机制带来的挑战，使用了弱解理论、能量估计和收敛性分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 当α∈(3/2,19/12)时，对于充分正则的初值，初边值问题存在全局连续弱解；在适当拓扑意义下，解收敛到平衡态(u_∞,0)，且当v_0充分小而u_0非常数时，极限分布u_∞是非均匀的
AI.significance: 为双退化趋化系统提供了首个全局存在性结果，揭示了参数范围对解行为的影响，发展了处理双退化扩散的新分析工具，对生物数学中的趋化模型理论有重要贡献

title: An optimal boundary control approach to the Cherrier-Escobar problem
summary: We study an optimal boundary control problem associated to the boundary obstacle problem for the couple conformal Laplacian and conformal Robin operator on n-dimensional compact Riemannian manifolds with boundary and with n\geq 3. When the Cherrier-Escobar invariant of the compact Riemannian manifold with boundary is positive, we show that the optimal controls are equal to their associated optimal states. Moreover, we show that the optimal controls are minimizers of the Cherrier-Escobar functional, and hence induce conformal metrics with zero scalar curvature and constant mean curvature. Furthermore, we show the existence of an optimal control under an Aubin type assumption. For the standard unit ball, we derive a sharp Sobolev trace type inequality and prove that the standard bubbles-namely conformal factor of metrics conformal to the standard one with zero scalar curvature and constant mean curvature -- are the only optimal controls and hence equal to their associated optimal states.

AI.tldr: 研究了n维紧致黎曼流形边界上共形拉普拉斯算子和共形Robin算子的边界障碍问题的最优边界控制问题
AI.motivation: 研究紧致黎曼流形边界上的最优边界控制问题，该问题与共形拉普拉斯算子和共形Robin算子的边界障碍问题相关，旨在寻找能够诱导零标量曲率和常平均曲率共形度量的最优控制
AI.techniques: 使用Cherrier-Escobar泛函、变分方法、Sobolev迹不等式、共形几何技术，以及Aubin型假设下的存在性证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当Cherrier-Escobar不变量为正时，最优控制等于其关联的最优状态；2. 最优控制是Cherrier-Escobar泛函的极小化子，诱导零标量曲率和常平均曲率共形度量；3. 在Aubin型假设下最优控制存在性；4. 对标准单位球，建立了尖锐的Sobolev迹不等式，证明标准气泡是唯一最优控制
AI.significance: 将最优控制理论与共形几何中的Yamabe型问题相结合，为边界障碍问题提供了新的分析框架，建立了最优控制与共形度量构造之间的深刻联系，推广了Sobolev迹不等式理论

title: Representation theorems for nonvariational solutions of the Helmholtz equation
summary: We consider a possibly multiply connected bounded open subset $Ω$ of ${\mathbb{R}}^n$ of class $C^{\max\{1,m\},α}$ for some $m\in {\mathbb{N}}$, $α\in]0,1[$ and we plan to solve both the Dirichlet and the Neumann problem for the Helmholtz equation in $Ω$ and in the exterior of $Ω$ in terms of acoustic layer potentials. Then we turn to prove an integral representation theorem solutions of the Helmholtz equation in terms of a single layer acoustic potential. The main focus of the paper is on $α$-Hölder continuous solutions which may not have a classical normal derivative at the boundary points of $Ω$ and that may have an infinite Dirichlet integral around the boundary of $Ω$\, \textit{i.e.}, case $m=0$. Namely for solutions that do not belong to the classical variational setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在非经典变分设定下，Helmholtz方程在Hölder连续函数空间中的Dirichlet和Neumann问题，并建立了单层声学势能的积分表示定理。
AI.motivation: 研究Helmholtz方程在非经典变分设定下的边值问题，特别是针对那些在边界点可能没有经典法向导数、Dirichlet积分在边界附近可能发散的α-Hölder连续解（m=0情况），这些解不属于传统的变分框架。
AI.techniques: 使用声学层势能方法（单层和双层势能），在Hölder连续函数空间中分析Helmholtz方程，处理非光滑边界条件下的积分方程理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在Ω内部和外部求解Helmholtz方程的Dirichlet和Neumann问题；2. 建立Helmholtz方程解的积分表示定理，用单层声学势能表示；3. 特别关注m=0情况下的α-Hölder连续解。
AI.significance: 扩展了Helmholtz方程边值问题的理论框架，处理了传统变分方法无法涵盖的非光滑解，为声波散射、电磁场理论等应用提供了更一般的数学基础。

title: Asymptotic Behavior of the Principal Eigenvalue Problems with Large Divergence-Free Drifts
summary: In this paper, we consider the following principal eigenvalue problem with a large divergence-free drift: \begin{equation}\label{0.1} -\varepsilonΔφ-2α\nabla m(x)\cdot\nabla φ+V(x)φ=λ_αφ \,\ \text{in}\, \ H_0^1(Ω),\tag{0.1} \end{equation} where the domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N (N\ge 1)$ is bounded with smooth boundary $\partialΩ$, the constants $\varepsilon>0$ and $α>0$ are the diffusion and drift coefficients, respectively, and $m(x)\in C^{2}(\barΩ)$, $V (x)\in C^γ(\barΩ)~(0<γ<1)$ are given functions. For a class of divergence-free drifts where $m$ is a harmonic function in $Ω$ and has no first integral in $H_{0}^{1}(Ω)$, we prove the convergence of the principal eigenpair $(λ_α, φ)$ for (0.1) as $α\rightarrow+\infty$, which addresses a special case of the open question proposed in [H. Berestycki, F. Hamel and N. Nadirashvili, CMP, 2005]. Moreover, we further investigate the refined limiting profiles of the principal eigenpair $(λ_α, φ)$ for (0.1) as $α\rightarrow+\infty$, which display the visible effects of the large divergence-free drifts on the principal eigenpair $(λ_α, φ)$.

AI.tldr: 研究具有大无散漂移的主特征值问题的极限行为，证明了当漂移系数趋于无穷时主特征对的收敛性，并给出了精细的极限剖面分析。
AI.motivation: 本文研究具有大无散漂移的主特征值问题，旨在解决Berestycki、Hamel和Nadirashvili在2005年提出的一个开放性问题。该问题涉及当漂移系数趋于无穷时，主特征值和特征函数的极限行为，特别关注无散漂移对特征结构的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析、特征值理论、调和函数理论以及偏微分方程技术。通过假设漂移函数m是调和函数且在H_0^1(Ω)中没有第一积分，建立了主特征对的收敛性证明框架。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当α→∞时，主特征对(λ_α, φ)的收敛性定理；2. 主特征对(λ_α, φ)的精细极限剖面分析，揭示了无散漂移对特征结构的可见影响。
AI.significance: 解决了Berestycki等人提出的开放性问题的一个特殊情形，为理解大漂移对特征值问题的影响提供了理论框架。结果对反应扩散方程、种群动力学和量子力学中的相关模型有重要意义，揭示了无散漂移在极限情况下的特殊行为。

title: Classification of the structures of stable radial solutions for semilinear elliptic equations in $\bf R^N$
summary: We study the stability of radial solutions of the semilinear elliptic equation $Δu +f(u)=0$ in ${\bf R^N}$, where $N \geq 3$ and $f$ is a general superciritical nonlinearity. We give a classification of the solution structures with respect to the stability of radial solutions, and establish criteria for the existence and nonexistence of stable radial solutions in terms of the limits of $f'(u)F(u)$ as $u \to 0$ or $\infty$, where $F(u) = \int^{\infty}_u 1/f(t)dt$. Furthermore, we show the relation between the existence of singular stable solutions and the solution structure.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了超临界非线性半线性椭圆方程径向解的稳定性分类与存在性判据
AI.motivation: 研究高维空间(N≥3)中超临界非线性半线性椭圆方程Δu+f(u)=0径向解的稳定性问题，旨在建立完整的稳定性分类理论，并给出稳定径向解存在与否的判据
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、稳定性分析、能量泛函技术，通过分析f'(u)F(u)在u→0或∞时的极限行为来建立判据，其中F(u)=∫_u^∞ 1/f(t)dt
AI.main_theorems: 1. 径向解结构的稳定性分类；2. 稳定径向解存在与不存在的判据（基于f'(u)F(u)的极限行为）；3. 奇异稳定解存在性与解结构的关系
AI.significance: 为超临界非线性椭圆方程的稳定性理论提供了系统框架，建立了稳定性与非线性项渐近行为之间的深刻联系，对理解奇异解的存在性和稳定性有重要理论意义

title: Time-fractional nonlinear evolution equations with time-dependent constraints
summary: This article is devoted to presenting an abstract theory of time-fractional gradient flow equations for time-dependent convex functionals in real Hilbert spaces. The main results are concerned with the existence of strong solutions to time-fractional abstract evolution equations governed by time-dependent subdifferential operators. To prove these results, Gronwall-type lemmas for nonlinear Volterra integral inequalities and fractional chain-rule formulae are developed. Moreover, the obtained abstract results are applied to the initial-boundary value problem for time-fractional nonlinear parabolic equations on moving domains.

AI.tldr: 提出了时间分数阶梯度流方程的抽象理论，用于处理实Hilbert空间中依赖于时间的凸泛函
AI.motivation: 研究时间分数阶抽象演化方程，特别是由依赖于时间的次微分算子控制的时间分数阶梯度流方程，旨在建立强解的存在性理论
AI.techniques: 发展了非线性Volterra积分不等式的Gronwall型引理和分数阶链式法则公式，应用于时间分数阶抽象演化方程的强解存在性证明
AI.main_theorems: 建立了时间分数阶抽象演化方程强解的存在性定理，并将抽象结果应用于移动域上的时间分数阶非线性抛物方程的初边值问题
AI.significance: 为时间分数阶偏微分方程理论提供了统一的抽象框架，特别适用于处理移动域问题，扩展了分数阶演化和梯度流理论的应用范围

title: Localization and interpolation of parabolic $L^p$ Neumann problems
summary: We show a localization estimate for local solutions to the parabolic equation $-\partial_t u+\mbox{div} (A\nabla u)=0$ with zero Neumann data, assuming that the $L^p$ Neumann problem and $L^{p'}$ Dirichlet problem for the adjoint operator are solvable in a Lipschitz cylinder for some $p\in(1,\infty)$. Using this result, we establish the solvability of the Neumann problem in the atomic Hardy space for parabolic operators with bounded, measurable, time-dependent coefficients, and hence obtain the interpolation of solvability of the $L^p$ Neumann problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有有界可测时变系数的抛物算子在原子Hardy空间中的Neumann问题可解性，并获得了L^p Neumann问题的插值性质。
AI.motivation: 研究具有有界可测时变系数的抛物算子的Neumann问题可解性，这是抛物型偏微分方程理论中的重要问题，特别是在非光滑系数和非光滑区域情况下。
AI.techniques: 使用局部化解的局部化估计，结合L^p Neumann问题和L^{p'} Dirichlet问题的可解性假设，通过原子Hardy空间方法建立可解性结果。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在Lipschitz柱形区域中，当伴随算子的L^p Neumann问题和L^{p'} Dirichlet问题可解时，建立了局部解的局部化估计；2) 证明了具有有界可测时变系数的抛物算子在原子Hardy空间中的Neumann问题可解性；3) 获得了L^p Neumann问题可解性的插值结果。
AI.significance: 将椭圆算子的Hardy空间理论推广到抛物情形，为处理非光滑系数和边界条件的抛物方程提供了新的分析工具，并建立了不同函数空间之间的可解性联系。

title: Rigidity results in multi-bubble dynamics for non-radial energy-critical heat equation
summary:
This paper concerns the classification of asymptotic behaviors in multi-bubble dynamics for the energy-critical nonlinear heat equations in large dimensions $N\geq7$ without symmetry. This multi-bubble dynamics appears naturally at least for a sequence of times in view of soliton resolution. We assume each bubble is given by the scalings and translations of $\pm W$ with (localized) non-colliding conditions for a sequence of times, where $W$ is the ground state. The case of one soliton was previously established and in particular there is no blow-up. We consider the case of $J\geq2$ solitons, where we expect only infinite-time blow-up.
  We are able to identify three different scenarios, where we have a continuous-in-time resolution with an unexpected universal blow-up speed. The first one is when one scaling is much larger than the others. In this case, one bubble does not concentrate (hence stabilize) and the other bubbles concentrate with the universal blow-up speed $t^{-2/(N-6)}$ together with strong sign constraints. Next, assuming we are not in the first scenario, we establish a non-degenerate condition on the positions of bubbles to obtain that all bubbles concentrate with the universal blow-up speed $t^{-1/(N-4)}$. The last case we consider is a degenerate, but not too much degenerate, scenario. Here again, we obtain that all bubbles concentrate with the universal blow-up speed $t^{-1/(N-3)}$. This last rate has not been discovered before. Our theorem covers the case of four or less bubbles and we provide the construction of examples. To our knowledge, this is the first classification result in the non-radial multi-bubble dynamics, where both the scales, positions, and signs enter the dynamics nontrivially.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次对无对称性高维能量临界非线性热方程的多气泡动力学渐近行为进行了分类，发现了三种不同的爆破速率。
AI.motivation: 研究高维（N≥7）能量临界非线性热方程的多气泡动力学，该现象在孤子分解的背景下自然出现。先前单孤子情况已解决且无爆破，但多孤子（J≥2）情况预计会出现无限时间爆破，需要分类其渐近行为。
AI.techniques: 采用局部化非碰撞条件分析气泡动力学，通过尺度分析和位置约束条件分类不同场景，使用连续时间分解方法，结合符号约束和退化条件分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当一个尺度远大于其他时，一个气泡稳定化，其他气泡以t^{-2/(N-6)}速率爆破；2. 非退化位置条件下，所有气泡以t^{-1/(N-4)}速率爆破；3. 轻度退化条件下，所有气泡以t^{-1/(N-3)}速率爆破（首次发现该速率）。
AI.significance: 这是首个非径向多气泡动力学的分类结果，揭示了尺度、位置和符号对动力学的非平凡影响，为理解能量临界方程的多孤子相互作用提供了理论基础。

title: A class of non-cylindrical domains for parabolic equations
summary: We present a class of non-cylindrical domains where Dirichlet-type problems for parabolic equations, such as the heat equation, can be posed and solved. The regularity for the boundary of this class of domains is a mixed Lipschitz condition, as described in the bulk of the paper. The main tool is an adequate version of the implicit function theorem for functions with this kind of regularity. It is proved that the class introduced herein is of the same type as domains previously considered by several authors.

AI.tldr: 提出一类具有混合Lipschitz边界正则性的非柱形区域，使得抛物型方程（如热方程）的Dirichlet问题可适定求解。
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型方程在非柱形区域上的Dirichlet问题适定性，这类问题在数学物理和几何分析中具有重要意义。传统方法通常要求边界具有较高正则性，本文旨在放宽这一要求。
AI.techniques: 主要工具是针对混合Lipschitz正则性函数的隐函数定理的适当版本，用于处理边界正则性；通过比较证明所引入区域类与先前文献中考虑的区域类型相同。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了一类具有混合Lipschitz边界正则性的非柱形区域；2. 证明了在此类区域上抛物型方程的Dirichlet问题可适定求解；3. 证明了所引入区域类与先前文献中考虑的区域类型相同。
AI.significance: 扩展了抛物型方程适定性理论的应用范围，为在更低正则性边界上研究抛物问题提供了理论框架，对偏微分方程理论和数学物理应用具有重要价值。

title: A Landau-de Gennes Type Theory for Cholesteric-Helical Smectic-Smectic C* Liquid Crystal Phase Transitions
summary: We present a rigorous mathematical analysis of a modified Landau-de Gennes (LdG) theory modeling temperature-driven phase transitions between cholesteric, helical smectic, and smectic C* phases. This model couples a tensor-valued order parameter (nematic orientational order) with a real-valued order parameter (smectic layer modulation). We establish the existence of energy minimizers of the modified LdG energy in three dimensions, subject to Dirichlet conditions, and rigorously analyze the energy minimizers in two asymptotic limits. First, in the Oseen--Frank limit, we show that the global minimizer strongly converges to a minimizer of the Landau-de Gennes bulk energy. Second, in the limit of dominant elastic constants, we prove that the global minimizers converge to a classical helical director profile. Finally, through stability analysis and bifurcation theory, we derive the complete sequence of symmetry-breaking transitions with decreasing temperature-from the cholesteric phase (with in-plane twist and no layering) to an intermediate helical smectic phase (with in-plane twist and layering), and ultimately to the smectic C* phase (with out-of-plane twist and layering). These theoretical results are supported by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了修正Landau-de Gennes理论中能量极小元的存在性，并在两个渐近极限下分析了极小元的收敛性，通过稳定性分析和分歧理论推导了温度驱动的完整相变序列。
AI.motivation: 研究液晶中温度驱动的相变问题，特别是胆甾相、螺旋近晶相和近晶C*相之间的转变，建立修正Landau-de Gennes理论的数学基础。
AI.techniques: 变分方法、渐近分析、稳定性分析、分歧理论、数值模拟；在Oseen-Frank极限和主导弹性常数极限下的收敛性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 三维修正LdG能量在Dirichlet边界条件下极小元的存在性；2) Oseen-Frank极限下全局极小元强收敛到Landau-de Gennes体能量极小元；3) 主导弹性常数极限下全局极小元收敛到经典螺旋指向矢分布；4) 通过稳定性分析得到完整的对称破缺相变序列。
AI.significance: 为液晶相变理论提供了严格的数学基础，建立了修正LdG模型的数学框架，对理解复杂液晶系统的相行为和对称破缺机制有重要理论意义。

title: On a class of logarithmic Schrödinger equations via perturbation method
summary: In this paper, we consider the following logarithmic Schrödinger equation \[ -Δu + V(x)u = u \log u^{2} \quad \text{in }\ \mathbb{R}^{N}. \] Assuming that \(V(x)\in C(\mathbb{R}^{N})\) and \(V(x)\to+\infty\) as \(|x|\to\infty\), we develop a new perturbative variational approach to overcome the lack of \(C^{1}\)-smoothness of the associated functional and prove the existence and multiplicity of nontrivial weak solutions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的摄动变分方法来处理对数薛定谔方程中泛函缺乏C¹光滑性的问题，证明了非平凡弱解的存在性和多重性。
AI.motivation: 对数薛定谔方程在量子力学、量子光学和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚等领域有重要应用。该方程对应的能量泛函缺乏C¹光滑性，传统变分方法难以直接应用，需要发展新的数学工具来处理这种非光滑结构。
AI.techniques: 提出了一种新的摄动变分方法，通过构造适当的摄动泛函来克服原泛函缺乏C¹光滑性的困难。该方法结合了变分原理、临界点理论和位势理论，特别处理了V(x)在无穷远处趋于无穷大的位势情况。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在V(x)∈C(ℝᴺ)且V(x)→+∞当|x|→∞的条件下，对数薛定谔方程存在非平凡弱解，并且在一定条件下存在多重解（多个解）。
AI.significance: 为处理具有对数非线性项的薛定谔方程提供了新的数学框架，克服了传统变分方法在处理非光滑泛函时的局限性。该方法可推广到其他具有非光滑结构的非线性偏微分方程，对量子力学中的相关模型研究有重要理论价值。

title: A Sharp Global Boundedness Result for Keller--Segel--(Navier--)Stokes Systems with Rapid Diffusion and Saturated Sensitivities
summary:
We investigate the Keller--Segel--(Navier--)Stokes system posed in a smooth bounded domain \(Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N\) with \(N = 2,3\): \begin{equation*} \begin{cases} n_t + u \cdot \nabla n = Δn - \nabla \cdot \big( n S(n)\nabla c \big), \\[2mm] u \cdot \nabla c = Δc - c + n, \\[2mm] u_t + κ(u \cdot \nabla) u = Δu - \nabla P + n \nabla φ, \\[2mm] \nabla \cdot u = 0, \end{cases} \end{equation*} where \(κ\in \left \{0,1 \right \} \), the given gravitational potential \(φ\in W^{2, \infty}(Ω)\), and the chemotactic sensitivity function \(S \in C^2([0,\infty))\).
  Under no-flux boundary conditions for \(n\) and \(c\), together with the Dirichlet boundary condition for \(u\), we show that, provided the initial data satisfy suitable regularity assumptions, the following results hold: \begin{itemize}
  \item If \(N = 2\), \(κ= 1\), and the sensitivity function satisfies
  \(\lim_{ξ\to \infty} S(ξ) = 0\), then the Keller--Segel--Navier--Stokes system admits
  a global classical solution that remains uniformly bounded in time.
  \item If \(N = 3\), \(κ= 0\), and \(S\) satisfies
  \[
  |S(ξ)| \le K_S (ξ+ 1)^{-α} \quad \text{for all } ξ\ge 0,
  \]
  with some constants \(K_S > 0\) and \(α> \frac{1}{3}\), then the
  Keller--Segel--Stokes system possesses a global bounded classical solution. \end{itemize} Our results are optimal, since it is well established that, in the absence of fluid effects, blow-up can occur when $S \equiv \mathrm{const}$ in two dimensions, or when $α< \tfrac{1}{3}$ in three dimensions.

AI.tldr: 研究了Keller-Segel-(Navier-)Stokes系统在二维和三维有界区域中的全局经典解存在性和有界性
AI.motivation: Keller-Segel模型描述细胞趋化现象，与流体耦合后形成Keller-Segel-(Navier-)Stokes系统。经典Keller-Segel模型在二维和三维中可能发生爆破，研究流体耦合如何抑制爆破现象，以及敏感性函数衰减条件对解全局存在性的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、最大模原理、正则性理论、Sobolev嵌入、Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式等PDE分析技术，通过敏感性函数衰减条件控制非线性项，建立先验估计保证解的全局存在性和有界性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 二维情形(N=2, κ=1)：当敏感性函数S(ξ)在无穷远处趋于0时，Keller-Segel-Navier-Stokes系统存在全局经典解且时间一致有界。2. 三维情形(N=3, κ=0)：当|S(ξ)| ≤ K_S(ξ+1)^{-α}且α>1/3时，Keller-Segel-Stokes系统存在全局有界经典解。
AI.significance: 证明了流体耦合可以抑制Keller-Segel模型的爆破现象，给出了敏感性函数衰减条件的最优阈值(α>1/3)，将经典Keller-Segel模型的爆破理论推广到与流体耦合的情形，为生物流体动力学提供了严格的数学基础。

title: Sub-wavelength resonances in two-dimensional multi-layer elastic media
summary: In this paper, we focus on the sub-wavelength resonances in two-dimensional elastic media characterized by high contrasts in both Lamé parameters and density. Our contributions are fourfold. First, it is proved that the operator $\hat{\mathbf{S}}_{\partial D}^ω$, which serves as a leading order approximation to $\mathbf{S}_{\partial D}^ω$ as $ω\rightarrow0$, is invertible in the space $\mathcal{L}(L^{2}\left(\partial D)^{2},H^{1}(\partial D)^{2}\right)$. Second, based on layer potential techniques in combination with asymptotic analysis, we derive an original formula for the leading-order terms of sub-wavelength resonance frequencies, which are controlled by the determinant of the $3N \times 3N$ matrices. Specifically, there are $3N$ resonance frequencies within an $N$-nested layer structure. In addition, the scattering field exhibits an enhancement coefficient on the order of $\mathcal{O}(ω^{-2})$ as the incident frequency $ω$ approaches the resonance frequency. Third, by applying spectral properties to solve the corresponding eigenvalue problem, we compute the quantitative expressions for sub-wavelength resonance frequencies within a disk. Finally, some numerical experiments are provided to illustrate theoretical results and demonstrate the existence of the sub-wavelength resonance modes.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了二维弹性介质中亚波长共振，推导了共振频率的解析公式并证明了散射场的增强效应。
AI.motivation: 研究具有高对比度Lamé参数和密度的二维弹性介质中的亚波长共振现象，这是弹性波散射理论中的重要问题，与声子晶体、超材料等应用密切相关。
AI.techniques: 层势技术、渐近分析、算子理论、谱分析、数值实验，特别是通过渐近展开处理低频极限下的算子可逆性问题。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了近似算子$\hat{\mathbf{S}}_{\partial D}^ω$在$ω\rightarrow0$时的可逆性；2. 推导了亚波长共振频率的解析公式，由$3N \times 3N$矩阵的行列式控制；3. 证明了散射场在共振频率附近具有$\mathcal{O}(ω^{-2})$量级的增强系数；4. 给出了圆盘中亚波长共振频率的定量表达式。
AI.significance: 为弹性波亚波长共振提供了系统的理论框架，对声子晶体、弹性超材料设计有重要指导意义，特别是共振频率的解析公式和增强效应的定量描述为实际应用提供了理论基础。

title: Traveling waves for monostable reaction-diffusion-convection equations with discontinuous density-dependent coefficients
comment: This version contains minor revisions in the nonexistence part
summary: This paper concerns wave propagation in a class of scalar reaction-diffusion-convection equations with $p$-Laplacian-type diffusion and monostable reaction. We introduce a new concept of a non-smooth traveling wave profile, which allows us to treat discontinuous diffusion with possible degenerations and singularities at 0 and 1, as well as only piecewise continuous convective velocity. Our approach is based on comparison arguments for an equivalent non-Lipschitz first-order ODE. We formulate sufficient conditions for the existence and non-existence of these generalized solutions and discuss how the convective velocity affects the minimal wave speed compared to the problem without convection. We also provide brief asymptotic analysis of the profiles, for which we need to assume power-type behavior of the diffusion and reaction terms.

AI.tldr: 提出非光滑行波解概念，处理具有间断扩散、退化奇异性及分段连续对流速度的p-Laplacian型反应-扩散-对流方程
AI.motivation: 研究具有p-Laplacian型扩散、单稳态反应和对流的标量方程中的波传播问题，传统光滑解方法无法处理扩散系数在0和1处的间断、退化及奇异性，以及分段连续的对流速度
AI.techniques: 引入非光滑行波解概念，使用等价非Lipschitz一阶ODE的比较论证方法，分析扩散项和对流项对最小波速的影响
AI.main_theorems: 建立了广义解存在性和不存在性的充分条件，分析了对流速度对最小波速的影响（与无对流问题比较），提供了幂律型扩散和反应项假设下的渐近分析
AI.significance: 扩展了反应-扩散-对流方程波传播理论，为处理非光滑系数和退化奇异问题提供了新框架，对理解复杂介质中的波传播有重要理论意义

title: A functional inequalities approach for the field-road diffusion model with (symmetric) nonlinear exchanges
summary: In this note, we consider the so-called field-road diffusion model in a bounded domain, consisting of two parabolic PDEs posed on sets of different dimensions and coupled through (symmetric) nonlinear exchange terms. We propose a new and rather direct functional inequalities approach to prove the exponential decay of a relative entropy, and thus the convergence of the solution towards the stationary state selected by the total mass of the initial datum.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的函数不等式方法证明场-路扩散模型中相对熵的指数衰减和稳态收敛
AI.motivation: 研究有界区域中场-路扩散模型，该模型由两个不同维数集合上的抛物型PDE组成，通过对称非线性交换项耦合，需要证明解向稳态的收敛性
AI.techniques: 新的直接函数不等式方法，通过相对熵分析证明指数衰减，利用总质量守恒选择稳态
AI.main_theorems: 证明了相对熵的指数衰减，从而得到解向由初始数据总质量确定的稳态的收敛性
AI.significance: 为场-路扩散模型提供了新的收敛性分析方法，简化了证明过程，对耦合抛物型系统的大时间行为研究有理论意义

title: Sharp lower bound for the Monge-Ampère torsion on convex sets
summary: The \emph{Monge-Ampère} torsion deficit of an open, bounded convex set $Ω\subset\R^n$ of class $C^2$ is the normalized gap between the value of the torsion functional evaluated on $Ω$ and its value on the ball with the same $(n-1)$-quermassintegral as $Ω$. Using the technique of the \emph{shape derivative}, we prove that the ratio between this deficit and to a geometric deficit arising from the \emph{Alexandrov-Fenchel inequality}, for any given family of open, bounded convex sets of $\R^n$ ($n\geq2$) of class $C^2$, smoothly converging to a ball, is bounded from below by a dimensional constant. We also show that this ratio is always bounded from above by a constant.

AI.tldr: 证明了凸集上Monge-Ampère扭转亏量与Alexandrov-Fenchel不等式几何亏量之比的上下界存在性
AI.motivation: 研究凸集几何分析中的Monge-Ampère扭转亏量问题，探讨其与Alexandrov-Fenchel不等式几何亏量之间的关系，属于凸几何分析与偏微分方程交叉领域
AI.techniques: 主要使用形状导数技术，结合凸几何分析中的Alexandrov-Fenchel不等式，以及Monge-Ampère方程相关理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于光滑收敛于球的凸集族，扭转亏量与几何亏量之比存在下界（仅依赖于维度）；同时证明了该比值总是有上界
AI.significance: 建立了Monge-Ampère扭转亏量与经典几何不等式亏量之间的定量关系，为凸几何分析中的稳定性问题提供了新的理论工具，深化了对凸集几何性质的理解

title: Bernstein type gradient estimate for system of weighted local heat equations with potential term
summary: In this article we provide Bernstein type gradient estimates for two system of local weighted heat type equations with potentials on a weighted Riemannian manifold. We derive all possible cases considering linear potential, exponential potential, combining with static manifold and evolving manifold. This work partially resolved the problem raised by Bhattacharyya et al. in \cite{SB-1}.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了加权黎曼流形上带势的局部加权热型方程组的Bernstein型梯度估计
AI.motivation: 研究加权黎曼流形上带势的热型方程组的梯度估计问题，部分解决了Bhattacharyya等人提出的公开问题
AI.techniques: 使用Bernstein型梯度估计方法，考虑线性势、指数势与静态流形、演化流形的各种组合情况
AI.main_theorems: 建立了加权黎曼流形上带势的局部加权热型方程组的所有可能情况的梯度估计结果
AI.significance: 推广了热型方程的梯度估计理论，为加权几何分析和偏微分方程理论提供了新的工具

title: Optimal existence of weak solutions for the generalised Navier-Stokes-Voigt equations
summary:
In this study, we investigate the incompressible generalised Navier-Stokes-Voigt equations within a bounded domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^d$, where $d \geq 2$. The governing momentum equation is expressed as:  egin{align*} \partial_t( oldsymbol{v} - κΔ oldsymbol{v}) + 
abla \cdot ( oldsymbol{v} \otimes  oldsymbol{v}) + 
abla π- ν
abla \cdot  ig( |\mathbf{D}( oldsymbol{v})|^{p-2} \mathbf{D}( oldsymbol{v})  ig) =  oldsymbol{f}. \end{align*} Here, for $d \in \{2,3\}$, $ oldsymbol{v}$ represents the velocity field, $π$ denotes the pressure, and $ oldsymbol{f}$ is the external forcing term. The constants $κ$ and $ν$ correspond to the relaxation time and kinematic viscosity, respectively. The parameter $p \in (1, \infty)$ characterizes the fluid's flow behavior, and $\mathbf{D}( oldsymbol{v})$ denotes the symmetric part of the velocity gradient $
abla  oldsymbol{v}$. For the power-law exponent $p \in  ig(  rac{2d}{d+2}, \infty  ig)$, we establish the existence of a weak solution to the generalised Navier-Stokes-Voigt equations. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the weak solution is unique for the same range of the exponent $p$. The optimality of our results lies in the framework's use of a Gelfand triple, which allows the Aubin-Dubinskii lemma to yield strong convergence of approximate solutions, essential for existence and valid precisely for $p >  rac{2d}{d+2}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了广义Navier-Stokes-Voigt方程弱解的存在唯一性，参数范围$p > \frac{2d}{d+2}$是最优的
AI.motivation: 研究广义Navier-Stokes-Voigt方程，该方程结合了Voigt阻尼项($\kappa\Delta\boldsymbol{v}$)和幂律型非线性粘性项($|\mathbf{D}(\boldsymbol{v})|^{p-2}\mathbf{D}(\boldsymbol{v})$)，用于描述具有记忆效应和非牛顿特性的复杂流体行为
AI.techniques: 使用Gelfand三重结构框架，应用Aubin-Dubinskii引理获得近似解的强收敛性，这是存在性证明的关键；通过能量估计和紧性方法处理非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 对于$p \in \big( \frac{2d}{d+2}, \infty \big)$，证明了广义Navier-Stokes-Voigt方程弱解的存在性，并且在该参数范围内弱解是唯一的；结果的最优性体现在参数范围$p > \frac{2d}{d+2}$恰好是Aubin-Dubinskii引理能够提供强收敛性的临界条件
AI.significance: 为具有Voigt阻尼和幂律粘性的非牛顿流体模型提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了Navier-Stokes方程的理论框架，对复杂流体力学和记忆材料的研究有重要理论价值

title: Wasserstein geometry of nonnegative measures on finite Markov chains I: Gradient flow
summary: We investigate a Benamou--Brenier type transportation metric for nonnegative measures on a finite reversible Markov chain, which endows the space of measures with a Riemannian structure. Using this geometric framework, we identify a generalized heat equation with source as the gradient flow of the discrete entropy. Moreover, by means of a local Łojasiewicz inequality, we prove exponential convergence of the flow to a unique equilibrium. Our results clarify the role of the Benamou--Brenier formulation in discrete optimal transport for nonnegative measures and provide a coherent geometric interpretation of generalized diffusion equations with source terms.

AI.tldr: 在有限可逆马尔可夫链上建立基于Benamou-Brenier型输运度量的黎曼几何框架，将带源的广义热方程识别为离散熵的梯度流，并证明其指数收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究离散最优输运中Benamou-Brenier公式在非负测度空间中的作用，为带源的广义扩散方程提供一致的几何解释，将连续最优输运的几何框架推广到离散情形。
AI.techniques: Benamou-Brenier型输运度量、黎曼几何框架、梯度流理论、局部Łojasiewicz不等式、离散熵泛函分析、马尔可夫链上的测度空间几何。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在有限可逆马尔可夫链的非负测度空间上构造了Benamou-Brenier型输运度量，赋予其黎曼结构；2. 识别带源的广义热方程为离散熵的梯度流；3. 利用局部Łojasiewicz不等式证明梯度流指数收敛到唯一平衡态。
AI.significance: 为离散最优输运提供了几何框架，统一了连续和离散情形的梯度流理论，阐明了Benamou-Brenier公式在离散测度空间中的作用，为分析离散扩散方程的动力学行为提供了新工具。

title: Wasserstein geometry of nonnegative measures on finite Markov chains II: Geodesic and duality formulae
summary: In this paper, we investigate the geodesic structure and the associated Kantorovich-type duality for a Benamou-Brenier-type transportation metric defined on the space of nonnegative measures over a finite reversible Markov chain. The metric is introduced through a dynamic formulation that combines transport and source costs along solutions of a nonconservative continuity equation, where mass variation is constrained to occur along a fixed strictly positive reference direction. We show that geodesics associated with this metric exhibit a non-locality property: almost every time, they are supported on the whole state space, independently of the choice of endpoints. Moreover, along optimal curves, the source term displays a characteristic temporal profile, with mass creation occurring at early times and subsequent decay as the curve approaches the target measure. As an application of this property, we compare our metric with the shift-transport distance and prove that the latter is always bounded above by our metric. Finally, we establish a Kantorovich-type duality formula in terms of Hamilton-Jacobi subsolutions, which provides a characterization of the metric and highlights the role of the momentum associated with geodesic curves.

AI.tldr: 在有限可逆马尔可夫链上，建立了结合输运和源项成本的Benamou-Brenier型度量，揭示了测地线的非局部性和源项的时间剖面特性。
AI.motivation: 研究有限可逆马尔可夫链上非负测度空间的几何结构，通过动态公式引入结合输运成本和源项成本的Benamou-Brenier型度量，其中质量变化沿固定正参考方向发生，旨在理解此类度量的测地线行为和相应的对偶理论。
AI.techniques: 使用非保守连续性方程的动态公式，结合输运和源项成本；分析测地线的非局部性；建立Hamilton-Jacobi次解的对偶公式；比较shift-transport距离；利用最优输运理论和变分方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 测地线具有非局部性：几乎每时刻支撑在整个状态空间；2) 源项时间剖面：质量在早期产生，后期衰减；3) shift-transport距离总被该度量上界控制；4) 建立了基于Hamilton-Jacobi次解的Kantorovich型对偶公式。
AI.significance: 为有限状态空间上的最优输运理论提供了新视角，将源项成本纳入度量框架，揭示了测地线的全局支撑特性，建立了与shift-transport距离的联系，发展了非保守连续性方程的对偶理论，对理解马尔可夫链上的几何结构有重要意义。

title: On the splitting of Neumann eigenvalues in perforated domains
summary: We address the problem of splitting of eigenvalues of the Neumann Laplacian under singular domain perturbations. We consider a domain perturbed by the excision of a small spherical hole shrinking to an interior point. Our main result establishes that the splitting of multiple eigenvalues is a generic property: if the center of the hole is located outside a set of Hausdorff dimension $N-1$ and the radius is sufficiently small, multiple eigenvalues split into branches of lower multiplicity. The proof relies on the validity of an asymptotic expansion for the perturbed eigenvalues in terms of the scaling parameter. Such an asymptotic formula is of independent interest and generalizes previous results; notably, in dimension $N\geq 3$, it is valid for holes of arbitrary shape.

AI.tldr: 证明了在奇异域扰动下，Neumann Laplacian多重特征值的分裂是泛性现象
AI.motivation: 研究Neumann Laplacian在奇异域扰动下的特征值行为，特别是当域中挖去一个收缩到内点的小孔时，多重特征值如何分裂
AI.techniques: 使用渐近展开方法，分析特征值关于尺度参数的渐近公式，利用Hausdorff维数理论处理例外集
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：多重特征值的分裂是泛性性质——当孔洞中心位于Hausdorff维数N-1的集合之外且半径足够小时，多重特征值分裂为低重数的分支
AI.significance: 推广了先前结果，在N≥3维时对任意形状孔洞都成立，为奇异扰动理论提供了新工具，对谱几何和扰动分析有重要意义

title: PDE aspects of the dynamical optimal transport in the Lorentzian setting
summary:
One of the crucial features of optimal transport on Riemannian manifolds is the equivalence of the `static', original, formulation of the problem and of the `dynamic' one, based on the study of the continuity equation. This furnishes the key link between Wasserstein geometry and PDEs that has found so many applications in the last 20 years.
  In this paper we investigate this kind of equivalence on spacetimes. At the PDE level, this requires to transition from the continuity equation to a suitable `continuity inequality', to which we shall refer to as `causal continuity inequality'. As a direct consequence of our findings we obtain a Lorentzian version of the celebrated Benamou--Brenier formula.

AI.tldr: 该论文将最优运输理论从黎曼流形推广到时空背景，建立了静态与动态公式的等价性，并得到了洛伦兹版本的Benamou-Brenier公式。
AI.motivation: 黎曼流形上的最优运输理论中，静态公式与基于连续性方程的动态公式的等价性是关键特征，这建立了Wasserstein几何与PDE之间的联系。论文旨在将这种等价性推广到时空背景，研究洛伦兹几何中的最优运输问题。
AI.techniques: 从连续性方程过渡到"因果连续性不等式"，建立时空背景下的动态公式；将黎曼几何中的技术推广到洛伦兹几何；利用因果结构处理时空的特殊性质。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了时空上最优运输的静态与动态公式的等价性；得到了洛伦兹版本的Benamou-Brenier公式，这是黎曼几何中著名公式在时空背景下的推广。
AI.significance: 将最优运输理论扩展到时空背景，为研究广义相对论、宇宙学中的质量传输问题提供数学框架；建立了Wasserstein几何与相对论PDE之间的联系；为时空几何分析开辟了新方向。

title: Onsager's Mean Field Theory of Vortex Flows with Singular Sources: Blow-Up and Concentration without Quantization
summary: Motivated by the Onsager statistical mechanics description of turbulent Euler flows with point singularities, we make a first step in the generalization of the mean field theory in [Caglioti, Lions, Marchioro, Pulvirenti; Comm. Math. Phys. (1995)]. On one side we prove the equivalence of statistical ensembles, on the other side we are bound to the analysis of a new blow up phenomenon, which we call "blow up and concentration without quantization", where the mass associated with the concentration is allowed to take values in a full interval of real numbers. This singular behavior may be regarded as lying between the classical blow up-concentration-quantization and the blow up without concentration phenomenon first proposed in [Lin, Tarantello; C.R. Math. Acad. Sci. Paris (2016)]. A careful analysis is needed to generalize known pointwise estimates in this non standard context, resulting in a complete description of the allowed asymptotic profiles.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了具有点奇性的湍流欧拉流的统计力学描述，推广了平均场理论，发现了"无量子化的爆破与集中"新现象。
AI.motivation: 受Onsager统计力学对具有点奇性的湍流欧拉流描述启发，推广Caglioti等人(1995)的平均场理论，研究统计系综等价性和新的爆破现象。
AI.techniques: 统计力学方法、平均场理论、爆破分析、点估计技术、渐近轮廓分析、非标准上下文中的点估计推广。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了统计系综的等价性；2) 发现了"无量子化的爆破与集中"新现象，其中集中质量可在实数区间内取值；3) 完整描述了允许的渐近轮廓。
AI.significance: 该研究连接了经典爆破-集中-量子化现象与Lin和Tarantello(2016)提出的无集中爆破现象，为湍流统计力学提供了新的数学框架，对理解流体力学中的奇性形成有重要意义。

title: Asymptotic Stability of Rarefaction Waves for the Hyperbolized Navier-Stokes-Fourier System
summary: This paper investigates the asymptotic stability of rarefaction waves for a one-dimensional compressible fluid system, where the Newton's law of viscosity and Fourier's law of heat conduction are replaced by Maxwell's law and Cattaneo's law, respectively. The system, which generalizes the classical Navier-Stokes-Fourier equations, features finite signal propagation speeds. We consider the Cauchy problem in Lagrangian coordinates with initial data connecting two different constant states via a rarefaction wave of the corresponding Euler system. Our main result proves that, provided the initial perturbation and wave strength are sufficiently small, the relaxation system admits a unique global solution. Furthermore, this solution converges uniformly to the background rarefaction wave as time approaches infinity. The proof is established through a combination of the relative entropy method and usual energy estimates.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有Maxwell粘性和Cattaneo热传导的一维可压缩流体系统中稀疏波的渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究广义的Navier-Stokes-Fourier方程系统，其中牛顿粘性定律和傅里叶热传导定律分别被Maxwell定律和Cattaneo定律替代，该系统具有有限信号传播速度，需要分析其稀疏波的渐近稳定性
AI.techniques: 相对熵方法和常规能量估计相结合
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在初始扰动和波强度足够小的条件下，松弛系统存在唯一全局解，且该解随时间趋于无穷时一致收敛到背景稀疏波
AI.significance: 扩展了经典流体动力学中稀疏波稳定性的理论，为具有有限信号传播速度的非经典流体模型提供了数学基础，对理解非傅里叶热传导和非牛顿粘性效应具有重要意义

title: A Harnack-type inequality for a perturbed singular Liouville Equation

AI.tldr: 建立了带奇点的扰动Liouville方程解序列的Harnack型不等式
AI.motivation: 该研究源于Onsager统计力学对具有点奇性的湍流Euler流的描述，旨在分析带奇点的扰动Liouville方程解序列的渐近行为
AI.techniques: Harnack型不等式、Liouville型方程分析、奇点分析、渐近展开方法
AI.main_theorems: 得到了扰动Liouville方程解序列的Harnack型不等式，其中方程包含趋于零的参数ε_n和趋于极限的指数α_n
AI.significance: 为具有点奇性的湍流Euler流的统计力学描述提供了严格的数学基础，发展了带奇点的非线性椭圆方程的分析工具

title: Analytic spectral perturbation theory for a high-contrast Maxwell operator
summary:
We study analytic spectral perturbation theory for the time-harmonic Maxwell operator in a perfectly electrically conducting cavity containing a high-contrast core--shell structure. The dielectric permittivity equals $1$ in a bounded inclusion and a small complex parameter $δ$ in the surrounding shell. The limit $δ\to 0$ corresponds to an infinite-contrast regime and leads to a degenerate Maxwell system. Despite this degeneracy, we develop a detailed spectral theory for the limiting problem for general Lipschitz inclusions and shells.
  Using a novel operator-theoretic reformulation, we prove complex-analytic dependence of the spectrum on $δ$ in a neighborhood of $δ= 0$. When the inclusion is a ball, we analyze the asymptotic expansion of eigenvalues and identify conditions under which the leading-order term is independent of the geometry of the surrounding shell. We also construct examples of resonances for which the leading-order asymptotics depend sensitively on the shell geometry, even in this symmetric setting. These results clarify the mechanisms underlying geometry-invariance of resonances in high-contrast Maxwell systems and explain their robustness under small complex perturbations.

AI.tldr: 建立了高对比度核-壳结构中Maxwell算子的解析谱摄动理论，揭示了共振的几何不变性机制
AI.motivation: 研究完美导电腔中高对比度核-壳结构的时谐Maxwell算子的谱摄动理论，δ→0对应无限对比度极限导致退化系统，需要建立退化问题的详细谱理论
AI.techniques: 新颖的算子理论重构方法，复解析摄动理论，谱渐近展开分析，在球对称情况下具体计算特征值渐近展开
AI.main_theorems: 证明了谱在δ=0邻域内对δ的复解析依赖性；当包含体为球体时，分析了特征值的渐近展开，识别了主导项与周围壳几何无关的条件；构造了主导渐近依赖于壳几何的共振例子
AI.significance: 阐明了高对比度Maxwell系统中共振几何不变性的机制，解释了它们在小复摄动下的鲁棒性，为高对比度电磁结构的设计和分析提供了理论基础

title: Stabilization of an incompressible fluid-elastic structure system using a vacuum bubble
summary: We prove a priori estimates for the system of partial differential equations modeling the interaction between an elastic body and an incompressible fluid in a 3D curved domain. The fluid is governed by the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations and contains a bubble whose interior is a vacuum. The elastic body is described by a damped wave equation, and interaction with the fluid takes place along a free interface whose initial domain is curved. We show that the presence of the vacuum bubble stabilizes the system in the sense that it provides control of the average of the pressure function, and hence allows global existence and exponential decay of smooth solutions for small data.

AI.tldr: 证明了弹性体与含真空气泡不可压缩流体在三维弯曲域中耦合系统的先验估计，揭示了真空气泡对系统的稳定作用。
AI.motivation: 研究弹性体与不可压缩流体在三维弯曲域中的耦合系统，其中流体包含真空气泡，弹性体由阻尼波方程描述，两者通过自由界面相互作用。核心问题是理解真空气泡对系统稳定性的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用偏微分方程先验估计方法，分析Navier-Stokes方程与阻尼波方程的耦合系统，特别关注真空气泡对压力函数平均值的控制作用。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统的先验估计，真空气泡的存在稳定了系统，提供了压力函数平均值的控制，从而保证了小初值下光滑解的全局存在性和指数衰减性。
AI.significance: 揭示了真空气泡在流体-弹性体耦合系统中的稳定机制，为理解此类复杂物理系统的长期行为提供了理论依据，对流体-结构相互作用领域有重要贡献。

title: A priori estimates and exact solvability for non-coercive stochastic control equations
summary: We establish, for the first time, explicit a priori and regularity estimates for solutions of the Dirichlet problem for Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman operators from stochastic control, whose principal half-eigenvalues have opposite signs. In addition, if the negative eigenvalue is not too negative, the problem can have exactly two, one or zero solutions, depending on the valuation function. This is a novel exact multiplicity result for fully nonlinear equations, which also yields a generalization of the Ambrosetti-Prodi theorem to such equations.

AI.tldr: 首次为具有相反符号主半特征值的随机控制Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman算子的Dirichlet问题建立了显式先验估计和正则性估计，并给出了精确的多解性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究随机控制中Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman算子的Dirichlet问题，特别是当主半特征值具有相反符号时的解的性质。这类完全非线性方程在最优控制理论中具有重要应用，但关于其解的存在性、唯一性和多重性的系统理论尚不完善。
AI.techniques: 使用完全非线性椭圆方程理论、特征值方法、先验估计技术、正则性理论，以及推广的Ambrosetti-Prodi型定理框架。通过分析主半特征值的符号来研究解的多重性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 首次建立了具有相反符号主半特征值的HJB算子Dirichlet问题的显式先验估计和正则性估计；2. 当负特征值不过于负时，问题可以有恰好两个、一个或零个解，具体取决于估值函数；3. 将Ambrosetti-Prodi定理推广到完全非线性方程。
AI.significance: 这是完全非线性方程理论的重要进展，首次为这类随机控制问题提供了系统的先验估计和正则性理论。精确的多解性结果为最优控制理论提供了新的数学工具，推广的Ambrosetti-Prodi定理为研究完全非线性方程的多解性开辟了新途径。

title: On the radius of analyticity and Gevrey regularity for the Boltzmann equation
summary: This paper investigates the non-cutoff Boltzmann equation for hard potentials in a perturbative setting. We first establish a sharp short-time estimate on the radius of analyticity and Gevrey regularity of mild solutions. Furthermore, we obtain a global-in-time radius estimate in Gevrey space. The proof combines hypoelliptic estimates with the macro-micro decomposition.

AI.tldr: 建立了硬势非截断Boltzmann方程在微扰框架下解的解析性和Gevrey正则性的尖锐短时估计，并获得了Gevrey空间中的全局时间半径估计。
AI.motivation: 研究硬势非截断Boltzmann方程在微扰框架下的正则性问题，特别是解的解析性和Gevrey正则性，这对于理解Boltzmann方程解的正则性传播机制具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 结合亚椭圆估计与宏观-微观分解方法，通过微扰框架分析解的解析性和Gevrey正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了温和解的解析半径和Gevrey正则性的尖锐短时估计；2. 获得了Gevrey空间中的全局时间半径估计。
AI.significance: 为硬势非截断Boltzmann方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，特别是解析性和Gevrey正则性的定量估计，对Boltzmann方程解的正则性传播机制有深入理解。

title: Exact solution of the (2+1)-dimensional damping forcing coupled Burgers equation by using Darboux transformation
summary: In this article, we investigate the (2+1)-dimensional damping forcing coupled Burgers equation, which is obtain by adding damping and forcing terms from couple Burgers equation. The Lax pair of the (2+1)-dimensional damping forcing coupled Burgers equation is established. With the help of Lax pair, we derive the $N$-fold Darboux transformation of (2+1)-dimensional damping forcing coupled Burgers equation. Using one fold and two fold Darboux transformation, we demonstrated some wave solutions including solitary wave solution and periodic wave solution. The impact of damping and forcing terms in solitary wave solution and periodic solution is graphically demonstrated.

AI.tldr: 建立了(2+1)维阻尼强迫耦合Burgers方程的Lax对和N重Darboux变换，并构造了孤波解和周期波解
AI.motivation: 研究(2+1)维阻尼强迫耦合Burgers方程，该方程通过在耦合Burgers方程中添加阻尼项和强迫项得到，旨在探索非线性波方程在阻尼和强迫作用下的可积性及精确解
AI.techniques: Lax对方法、Darboux变换技术（包括一重和N重变换）、精确解构造方法、图形分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了(2+1)维阻尼强迫耦合Burgers方程的Lax对；2. 推导了该方程的N重Darboux变换；3. 利用一重和二重Darboux变换构造了孤波解和周期波解
AI.significance: 扩展了Burgers方程的可积性理论，为研究阻尼和强迫作用下的非线性波动力学提供了精确解分析框架，在流体力学、等离子体物理等领域有应用价值

title: Sharp Quantitative Forms of the Hardy Inequality on Cartan-Hadamard Manifolds via Sobolev-Lorentz Embeddings
summary: In this article, we investigate the quantitative form of the classical Hardy inequality. In our first result, we prove the following quantitative bound under the assumption that the $\mathbb{M}^N$ is a Riemannian model satisfying the centered isoperimetric inequality: We prove that $$ \|\nabla_g u\|^2_{L^{2}(\mathbb{M}^N)} - \frac{(N-2)^2}{4}\left\|\frac{u}{r(x)}\right\|^2_{L^2(\mathbb{M}^N)} \geq C [\mbox{dist}(u, Z)]^{\frac{4N}{N-2}}\left\|\frac{u}{r(x)}\right\|^2_{L^2(\mathbb{M}^N)},$$ for every real-valued weakly differentiable function $u$ on $\mathbb{M}^N$ such that $|\nabla_g u| \in L^2(\mathbb{M}^N)$ and $u$ decays to zero at infinity. Here $r(x) = d_g(x,x_0)$ denotes the geodesic distance from a fixed pole $x_0,$ the set $Z$ represents the family of virtual extremals, and the distance is understood in an appropriate generalized Lorentz-type space. Our approach is built on the symmetrization technique on manifolds, combined with a novel Jacobian-type transformation that provides a precise way for comparing volume growth, level sets, and gradient terms across the two geometries of Euclidean and manifold settings. When coupled with symmetrization, this framework yields sharp control over the relevant functionals and reveals how the underlying curvature influences extremal behavior. Our result generalizes the seminal result of Cianchi-Ferone [Ann. Inst. H. Poincaré C Anal. Non Linéaire 25 (2008)] to the curved spaces. Moreover, building upon this transformation, we succeed in extending Sobolev-Lorentz embedding-classically formulated in the Euclidean setting to the broader framework of Cartan-Hadamard models and we establish an optimal Sobolev-Lorentz embedding in this geometric setting. Finally, we establish a quantitative correspondence between the Hardy deficit on the manifold and an appropriate weighted Hardy deficit in Euclidean space, showing that each controls the other.

AI.tldr: 该论文在黎曼模型流形上建立了Hardy不等式的定量形式，并将欧几里得空间中的Sobolev-Lorentz嵌入推广到Cartan-Hadamard模型。
AI.motivation: 研究经典Hardy不等式在黎曼流形上的定量形式，将Cianchi-Ferone在欧几里得空间中的开创性结果推广到弯曲空间，并建立Sobolev-Lorentz嵌入在几何框架下的最优形式。
AI.techniques: 流形上的对称化技术、新型Jacobi型变换、广义Lorentz型空间中的距离度量、比较欧几里得与流形几何中的体积增长、水平集和梯度项的方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在满足中心等周不等式的黎曼模型流形上，建立了Hardy不等式的定量下界估计；2. 将Sobolev-Lorentz嵌入推广到Cartan-Hadamard模型并证明其最优性；3. 建立了流形上Hardy亏量与欧几里得空间中加权Hardy亏量之间的定量对应关系。
AI.significance: 将欧几里得空间中的经典不等式定量分析推广到弯曲几何，为几何分析提供了新的工具，揭示了曲率对极值行为的影响，建立了不同几何框架之间的定量对应关系。

title: Existence and regularity of minimizers for a variational problem of species population density
summary: We study a variational problem motivated by models of species population density in a nonhomogeneous environment. We first analyze local minimizers and the structure of the saturated region (where the population attains its maximal density) from a free boundary perspective. By comparing the original problem with a radially symmetric minimization problem and studying its properties, we then establish the existence and structure of a global solution. Analytic examples of radially symmetric solutions and numerical simulations illustrate the theoretical results and provide insight into spatial saturation patterns in population models. We further highlight an unresolved question regarding the quasiconcavity of minimizers.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了非均匀环境中种群密度模型的变分问题，从自由边界角度分析了饱和区域的结构，并建立了全局解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于非均匀环境中物种种群密度模型的数学建模问题，需要分析种群达到最大密度的饱和区域结构，以及全局解的存在性和性质。
AI.techniques: 采用变分方法、自由边界理论、径向对称最小化问题比较、数值模拟等方法，从局部极小值分析到全局解结构研究。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了局部极小值的存在性和饱和区域结构，通过径向对称最小化问题比较证明了全局解的存在性和结构，提供了径向对称解的解析示例。
AI.significance: 为种群生态学中的空间分布模式提供了数学理论基础，发展了非均匀环境中自由边界问题的分析方法，提出了关于极小值拟凹性的未解决问题。

title: Analytic description of the moving moisture front in soils
summary: The fact that moisture propagates in soils at a finite speed is confirmed by natural everyday experience as well as by controlled laboratory tests. In this text, we rigorously derive analytical upper bounds for the speed of moisture front propagation under gravity for the solution to the Richards equation with compactly supported initial data. The main result is an explicit criterion describing a competition between gravity and capillarity, where the dominant effect is determined by the characteristics of the soil. If capillarity prevails, the initially wet regions remain wet for all times, while if gravity is dominant, moisture travels downward at a speed that is asymptotically bounded from below and above. As a by-product, we prove the existence and uniqueness of a solution to an initial value problem for the degenerate Richards equation on the whole space. Numerical simulations based on the proposed model confirm the theoretical predictions, with results that closely match experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 建立了Richards方程中水分锋面传播速度的严格解析上界，揭示了重力与毛细作用竞争机制
AI.motivation: 土壤中水分以有限速度传播，这一现象在自然观察和实验室测试中均有证实。研究旨在为Richards方程（描述多孔介质中水分运动的偏微分方程）在重力作用下水分锋面传播速度建立严格的数学理论框架。
AI.techniques: 使用退化Richards方程的数学分析技术，包括紧支集初值问题的存在唯一性证明，以及通过解析方法推导传播速度的上界估计。结合数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了重力作用下Richards方程水分锋面传播速度的解析上界；2. 提出了重力与毛细作用竞争的显式判据：毛细作用主导时初始湿润区域保持湿润，重力主导时水分向下传播速度具有渐近上下界；3. 证明了全空间上退化Richards方程初值问题解的存在唯一性。
AI.significance: 为土壤水分运动提供了严格的数学理论基础，揭示了重力与毛细作用的竞争机制，对农业灌溉、地下水管理、污染物迁移等应用领域具有重要指导意义。理论预测与实验观测高度吻合，验证了模型的可靠性。

title: Wiener Algebras Methods for Liouville Theorems on the Stationary Navier-Stokes System
summary: We prove some Liouville theorems for the stationary Navier-Stokes system for incompressible fluids. We provide some sufficient conditions on the low frequency part of the solution, using some properties of classical singular integrals with respect to Wiener algebras.

AI.tldr: 证明了不可压缩流体定常Navier-Stokes系统的Liouville型定理，通过Wiener代数性质对解的低频部分施加充分条件
AI.motivation: 研究定常Navier-Stokes系统的Liouville型定理，这类定理关注在何种条件下解必须是平凡的（零解），这对于理解流体方程解的结构和唯一性具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用Wiener代数的性质，结合经典奇异积分算子的理论，特别关注解的低频部分的分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了定常Navier-Stokes系统的Liouville定理，给出了解的低频部分满足某些充分条件时解必须为零的结论
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes方程Liouville定理的理论框架，为理解流体方程解的唯一性和渐近行为提供了新的工具和视角

title: On large periodic traveling wave solutions to the free boundary Stokes and Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We study the free boundary problem for a finite-depth layer of viscous incompressible fluid in arbitrary dimension, modeled by the Stokes or Navier-Stokes equations. In addition to the gravitational field acting in the bulk, the free boundary is acted upon by surface tension and an external stress tensor posited to be in traveling wave form. We prove that for any isotropic stress tensor with periodic profile, there exists a locally unique periodic traveling wave solution, which can have large amplitude. Moreover, we prove that the constructed traveling wave solutions are asymptotically stable for the dynamic free boundary Stokes equations. Our proofs rest on the analysis of the nonlocal normal-stress to normal-Dirichlet operators for the Stokes and Navier-Stokes equations in domains of Sobolev regularity.

AI.tldr: 证明了任意维度有限深度粘性流体层在表面张力、重力及外部应力作用下存在大振幅周期行波解及其渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究任意维度有限深度粘性不可压缩流体自由边界问题，考虑重力、表面张力和外部应力作用，建立行波解的存在性和稳定性理论
AI.techniques: 分析Stokes和Navier-Stokes方程在Sobolev正则性区域中的非局部法向应力到法向Dirichlet算子，运用算子理论和谱分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意各向同性周期应力张量，存在局部唯一的周期行波解（可有大振幅）；构造的行波解对动态自由边界Stokes方程是渐近稳定的
AI.significance: 建立了粘性流体自由边界问题行波解的一般存在性和稳定性理论，为波动现象和界面动力学研究提供了严格数学基础

title: The nonlinear Steklov problem in outward cuspidal domains
summary: In this article, we consider the nonlinear Steklov eigenvalue problem in outward cuspidal domains. Using the compactness of the weighted trace embedding we obtain the variational characterization of the first non-trivial eigenvalue and prove the existence of a corresponding weak solution.

AI.tldr: 在向外尖点区域中研究非线性Steklov特征值问题，通过加权迹嵌入的紧性获得第一非平凡特征值的变分刻画并证明弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究非线性Steklov特征值问题在非光滑区域（特别是向外尖点区域）中的适定性，这类区域具有奇异性，传统方法可能失效
AI.techniques: 使用加权迹嵌入的紧性分析，变分方法，弱解存在性证明，处理奇异区域上的边界值问题
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了向外尖点区域中非线性Steklov特征值问题的第一非平凡特征值的变分刻画；2. 证明了相应弱解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了Steklov特征值问题到奇异区域的研究，为处理非光滑边界上的非线性边界值问题提供了新的理论框架和方法
